case_title: WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING LLC VS. VINCENT L WILSON et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING LLC ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 3.0 HOURS
DECLARATION OF JEREMY S. GOLDEN IN SUPPORT OF DEFT'S OPPOS. TO PLNTF'S MTN TO AMEND OR SET ASIDE THE DISMISSAL FILED BY DEFENDANT WILSON, VINCENT L AN INDIVIDUAL

LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - PLAINTIFF WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING LLC'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER AMENDING THE DISMISSAL OF THIS ACTION SO THAT IT IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE OR SETTING ASIDE THE DISMISSAL AND ALLOWING THE CASE TO PROCEED TO TRIAL, THE MOTION IS GRANTED BASED ON C.C.P. SECTION 473. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSELS DECLARATION REFLECTS HER EXCUSABLE NEGLECT IN FAILING TO INCLUDE LANGUAGE IN THE STIPULATION TERMINATING ALL DISPUTES ARISING OUT OF THIS LAWSUIT. IT IS UNDISPUTED THAT SHE DID SO BASED ON HER REASONABLE RELIANCE ON DEFENSE COUNSEL'S ORAL AGREEMENT TO THAT EFFECT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: KATHY KOLLEHNER, CSR # 4102
